name: Bonanza Big Springs Park
description: Bonanza Big Springs Park is a place to play pickleball in Bonanza, OR. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Bonanza School Little Gym
description: Bonanza School Little Gym is a place to play pickleball in Bonanza, OR. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Crest Park
description: Crest Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Klamath Falls, OR. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Harbor Isles Fitness and Tennis Club
description: Come play pickleball at Harbor Isles Fitness and Tennis Club in Klamath Falls, OR! There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, food, water, and lights.

name: Klamath Basin Senior Citizens' Center
description: Klamath Basin Senior Citizens' Center is a place to play pickleball in Klamath Falls, OR. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The court is free.

name: Mazama High School
description: Come play pickleball at Mazama High School in Klamath Falls, OR! There are 8 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Mike's Field House - Steen Sports Park
description: Mike's Field House - Steen Sports Park is a place to play pickleball in Klamath Falls, OR. There are 9 asphalt courts. 3 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Running Y Ranch Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Running Y Ranch Resort in Klamath Falls, OR! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
